title: HIV and Antiretroviral Therapy in the Caribbean
description: Explore the management of HIV/AIDS and antiretroviral therapy across the diverse Caribbean region, with a focus on the unique clinical challenges and traditional medicine interactions faced by pharmacy technicians in countries like Trinidad & Tobago, Jamaica, Barbados, Guyana, and Belize.
what_youll_learn: Describe the epidemiology of HIV/AIDS in the Caribbean and its impact on public health
Identify the key antiretroviral drug classes and their mechanisms of action
Recognize common drug interactions between antiretrovirals and traditional Caribbean herbal medicines
Develop strategies to optimize medication adherence and chronic disease management for Caribbean patients living with HIV
Apply CARICOM regional guidelines and national formularies to ensure appropriate antiretroviral therapy selection and dosing
